CheckTitle: RDS instances have automated backup enabled
Description: Ensure that RDS instances have automated backup enabled to protect against data loss.
Risk: Without automated backups, data loss from accidental deletion, corruption, or hardware failure cannot be recovered, potentially leading to permanent data loss.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console.
2. Navigate to Relational Database Service.
3. Select the instance.
4. Click the Backup and Restoration tab.
5. Configure the automated backup policy with a retention period.
6. Click Save.

Recommendation.Text: Enable automated backup for all RDS instances with an appropriate retention period.
